introSection: Euro Express is a steel indoor roller coaster at Romon U-Park in Yingzhou, Ningbo, Zheijang, China.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Euro Express is basically a clone of Kanonen at Liseberg, except for the fact that it has a lift hill instead of a launch.

fullText:
Euro Express is a steel indoor roller coaster at Romon U-Park in Yingzhou, Ningbo, Zheijang, China.

Euro Express is basically a clone of Kanonen at Liseberg, except for the fact that it has a lift hill instead of a launch.
